summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Central Gate Estates website. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend components loading properly, and core functionality tested successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Select dropdown options not fully accessible via automated testing - dropdowns work manually but Playwright has difficulty selecting options

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components - accessibility warning in console

passed_tests: Error handling for invalid property IDs (404 responses)
Homepage loading with all 8 sections visible
Properties page loading with 7 property cards (6 seeded + 1 test)
Property cards display (address, bedrooms, rent, availability)
Book Viewing modal opening and form submission
Contact modal opening with email and WhatsApp links
WhatsApp button positioning in bottom right
Sticky CTA button appearance when scrolling
Toast notifications for successful form submissions
Email notifications MOCKED correctly (no actual emails sent)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor dropdown accessibility issue, all core functionality works)
